docs.creator: technicaljicama
docs.description: A remake of the sister location custom night for the Sony PSP written in c++. Currently, not all features are implemented (due to limited time for the game jam) but the game is playable and fun! Expect a few bugs and crashes (please report them here) Notes: A 3ds port will be developed soon! The code will be made open source! It will not work on a psp 1000 Controls: Cross (X) = Interact on the cams, click on bonnet, confirm R trigger (right shoulder button) = Open cam tablet DPAD Left = Move to the next cam on the left, select character in custom night. DPAD Right = Move to the next cam on the right, select character in custom night. DPAD Down = Decrease the character's level in the custom night menu. DPAD UP = Increase the character's level in the custom night menu. Square = Open/close left door Circle = Open/close right door Triangle = Open/close vent
docs.title: FNaF Sister Location: Custom Night PSP

docs.description: Higurashi no Naku Koro ni takes place during June 1983, at a fictional rural village called Hinamizawa, which has a population of approximately 2000. The main character, Keiichi Maebara, moves to Hinamizawa and befriends his new classmates Rena Ryugu, Mion Sonozaki, Rika Furude, and Satoko Hojo. Keiichi joins their after-school club activities, which consist mostly of card and board games (and punishment games for the loser, usually him.) Hinamizawa appears to be a normal, peaceful, rural village to Keiichi. However, the tranquility abruptly ends after the annual Watanagashi Festival, a celebration to commemorate and give thanks to the local god, Oyashiro-sama. Keiichi learns that every year for the past four years, one person has been murdered and another has gone missing on the day of the Watanagashi Festival. Keiichi himself soon becomes drawn into the strange events surrounding the Watanagashi Festival and Oyashiro-sama. In each story arc, he or one of his friends become paranoid, and a crime is committed. Usually, the crime involves the murder of one of their own friends. While it seems impossible to tell their delusions apart from the mystery of Hinamizawa, slowly the truth is revealed. [from Wikipedia ] Higurashi no Naku Koro ni (proper) is the first set of stories, including the "Question" arcs.

docs.description: Nazi Zombies: Portable Beta is a zombie survival shooter for the PlayStation Portable and any Windows machine. You start out at Round 1, where few zombies will come. After you kill the full wave of zombies, it will switch off to Round 2 where more zombies will come. The longer you survive, the harder it gets. You get points for rebuilding barricades, damaging zombies, knifing zombies, etc. The points can then be used to open doors, buy perks, buy weapons off the walls, and use the Mystery Box. The Mystery Box is a box where you pay 950 points in exchange for a random weapon, it ranges from a pistol to a killing machine. If your playing multiplayer, you use teamwork and tactics to survive the onslaught. Stick together to survive.

docs.description: Description : Welcome to "Out Of This Earth," an exciting puzzle adventure game in 3d. This version includes two chapters and it's playable on PSP or PPSSPP. Objective : Take control of the car and set out on a mission to collect all the scattered stars across the map. To achieve this goal, you must strategically solve a variety of puzzles. Your journey begins with Chapter 1, and upon successfully collecting all the scattered stars and following the tracks revealed in the sand, you will unlock access to the next chapter. In Chapter 2, gathering the stars becomes a more intricate task as you encounter thoughtful challenges that demand careful consideration. Completing Chapter 2 unlocks a surprising way to journey between both chapters. Controls : Use the Left, Right, Cross, and Triangle buttons to maneuver the car. As you progress through your adventure, you may also need to utilize the Circle, Square buttons, and/or the Left & Right Triggers to overcome challenges and uncover secrets. Embark on an immersive and challenging puzzle adventure, and enjoy the thrill of solving each chapter as you progress further into the game!
